title: cleome ornithopodioides subsp. cypria
intro: Cleome ornithopodioides subsp. cypria, also known as the 'Cyprus Spider Flower', is a plant species that belongs to the Cleomaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cleome ornithopodioides subsp. cypria include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Cleome ornithopodioides subsp. cypria include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
